summary: A Go-based CLI tool for defining, detecting, and running smoke tests with assertions and prerequisites.
concerns: No implementation files visible in key directories (only tests and templates)
Unclear purpose of nested GOrchestra/intel/ config directory
Missing documentation for the .gorchestra/ configuration format
suggestions: Add implementation files for core logic if tests are currently failing or stubbed
Add README and usage examples for the CLI commands (run/init/version)
